metadata.description: Post-build coherence reviewer for Claude Code — checks a change fits how the app is already built, heals small drift, files the rest, and never blocks the merge.

plugins.name: milestone-coherence-reviewer
plugins.description: After a change is built, check it fits how the rest of the app is already built — helpers, conventions, stack idioms — then heal small drift inline and file bigger drift as issues or a follow-up milestone, never blocking the merge.
